zh.hero_title:
高雄黃金四席
核心資產
zh.hero_sub:
御盟集團二十八載精工，八十五座世界大獎淬鍊。
四處不可複製的城市核心物件，靜候識者。
zh.cta_label_c: 預約鑑賞 · 線上賞屋  ·  PRIVATE VIEWING
zh.cta_note_h: 御盟集團  ·  自建自售  ·  品質保證
zh.cta_note_c: 御盟集團  ·  自建自售  ·  全新完工
zh.cta_note_b: 御盟集團  ·  聚市金店面  ·  吸睛人氣據點
zh.footer: © 2026 御盟建設股份有限公司  ·  高雄市前金區大同一路236號  ·  07-971-5585
zh.h_tagline: 亞灣核心 · 34米黃金大面寬 · 雙層623坪
zh.h_inv_h:
坐擁亞灣
最寬闊的城市展示面
zh.h_inv_p: 高雄市苓雅區海邊路45、46號，正對亞洲新灣區國際建設群。34米臨路大面寬，是高雄港都最醒目的商業招牌位置。緊鄰高雄展覽館、高雄港埠旅運中心，未來國際郵輪旅客靠岸，觀光消費商機無限。
h_hl: 34米超大面寬，戶外廣告效益極大化
正對亞洲新灣區，國際旅運商機直達
高雄展覽館、港埠旅運中心步行可達
輕軌軌道行經門前，大眾運輸零距離
漢神百貨、Focus 13 百貨商圈環繞
地下一層附設車位，進出獨立便利
zh.z_overline: ZHONGSHAN ROAD  ·  ASIA NEW BAY AREA
zh.z_tagline: 亞灣唯一大型商場 · 緊鄰日航酒店 · 813坪
zh.z_inv1_h:
亞洲新灣區唯一
大型平面商場
zh.z_inv1_p: 座落於前鎮區中山二路91號，中華經貿大樓B1F。813坪超大U字型商業空間，深44米、寬51米、高4.5米。獨立進出玻璃屋廊道，為娛樂休閒產業打造最佳區隔與自由空間。
zh.z_inv2_h:
國際酒店群環繞
觀光人流自然匯聚
zh.z_inv2_p: 緊鄰日航酒店260房、然一酒店147房、高雄洲際酒店253房、漢來大飯店540房。大遠百三多商圈步行僅2分鐘，捷運紅線三多商圈站近在咫尺。高雄流行音樂中心、5G AIoT園區等重大建設齊聚。
z_hl: 大遠百10連霸高雄地王，步行2分鐘
日航·然一·洲際·漢來 四大酒店緊鄰
三多商圈休閒娛樂產業健全
高雄港埠旅運中心國際旅客商機
5G AIoT 高雄軟體科技園區鄰近
地下商場不受天候影響，全年營業
獨立玻璃屋廊道，區隔自主經營
zh.c_tagline: 獨棟七層 · A級商辦 · 自然共生 · 477坪
zh.c_inv1_h:
讓企業再次偉大
首選正核心地標
zh.c_inv1_p: 高雄前金區大同一路236號，地上7+1層獨棟A級商辦。坐北朝南帝王向，與中央公園12.7公頃綠地為鄰。全棟單一業主不拆售，七張獨立權狀，適企業總部、研發中心、聯合診所、私人美術館。
zh.c_inv2_h:
頂真建築工藝
八十五座世界大獎
zh.c_inv2_p: 御盟集團28年建築經歷，榮獲85座世界級大獎。本案聘請香港首位世界50強張智強大師、EDGE國際設計團隊規劃。日本三菱電梯、YKK AP鋁門窗、德國Duker鑄鐵管、英國PERKINS發電機，頂規建材一次到位。
zh.c_fac1_desc: 通過美國 LEED 與 WELL 雙金級認證，從節能、環保到健康居住全面達標，為高雄極少數取得國際雙認證的商辦建築。
zh.c_fac2_desc: 採用日本新日鐵制震壁，有效降低地震搖晃幅度達40%以上，保護建築結構與室內精密設備安全。
zh.c_fac3_desc: 全棟採用 SS 鋼骨構造，抗震韌性極佳，大跨距無柱空間設計讓每一層樓都擁有最大的使用彈性。
zh.c_fac4_desc: 日本三菱原廠20人份高速電梯，B1至頂樓全停靠，靜音運行、安全穩定，滿足商辦大樓高運量需求。
zh.c_fac5_desc: 日本 YKK AP 鋁門窗，通過 CNS 氣密與水密最高等級，搭配 Low-E 複層玻璃，隔熱隔音抗紫外線。
c_floor: 4-6F — 醫美診所/辦公 · 樓高4.2M
7F+夾層 — 新品發表·私人美術館 · 8.4M
B1 — 停車場 · 酒窖空間
c_mat: 日本三菱20人份電梯，B1至頂樓皆停
YKK AP鋁門窗，氣密水密抗16級風
LowE複層玻璃，高隔音隔熱抗紫外線
德國Duker鑄鐵管，靜音防火長壽
台泥4000磅水泥 · 東和無輻射鋼筋
全棟中央淨水 · 美耐不鏽鋼管
距捷運美麗島站600公尺，步行5分鐘
zh.b_title: 保泰逸居 · 旗艦店面
zh.b_tagline: 162坪角窗旗艦 · 國際金三角 · 專屬電梯
zh.b_inv_h:
高雄國際金三角
角窗旗艦據點
zh.b_inv_p: 鳳山區保泰路308號，坐落在亞洲新灣區、小港國際機場、衛武營藝術文化中心三大國際地標交匯之處。一樓角窗旗艦店101.4坪，雙面寬保泰路23.38米與三商街18.43米。G1銀行等級使用分區，適合金融機構、品牌旗艦店進駐。
b_hl: 角窗雙面寬，品牌能見度最大化
G1銀行使用分區，高端品牌首選
專屬電梯間，B1檔案室安全獨立
亞灣 × 小港機場 × 衛武營 金三角

en.hero_sub:
28 years of meticulous craftsmanship. 85 international awards.
Four irreplaceable prime properties, awaiting discerning investors.
en.cta_note_h: Yuimom Group  ·  Self-Built & Self-Sold  ·  Quality Guaranteed
en.cta_note_c: Yuimom Group  ·  Self-Built & Self-Sold  ·  Newly Completed
en.cta_note_b: Yuimom Group  ·  Premium Storefront  ·  High-Traffic Location
en.footer: © 2026 Yuimom Construction Co., Ltd.  ·  No.236, Datong 1st Rd., Qianjin Dist., Kaohsiung  ·  07-971-5585
en.h_tagline: Asia New Bay Area · 34m Premium Frontage · 623 Ping Dual-Level
en.h_inv_h:
Commanding the Widest
Urban Showcase in Asia New Bay
en.h_inv_p: Located at No.45-46, Haibian Road, Lingya District — directly facing the Asia New Bay Area international development cluster. With 34 meters of road frontage, it is the most prominent commercial signage location in the Kaohsiung harbor city. Adjacent to the Kaohsiung Exhibition Center and Port Terminal, with unlimited tourism potential from future international cruise passengers.
h_hl: 34m ultra-wide frontage, maximizing outdoor advertising impact
Directly facing Asia New Bay Area, international tourism opportunities
Kaohsiung Exhibition Center & Port Terminal within walking distance
Light rail passes the entrance, zero-distance public transit
Surrounded by Hanshin Dept. Store & Focus 13 shopping district
en.z_overline: ZHONGSHAN ROAD  ·  ASIA NEW BAY AREA
en.z_tagline: Only Large-Scale Mall in Asia New Bay · Adjacent to Nikko Hotel · 813 Ping
en.z_inv1_h:
The Only Large-Scale
Ground-Level Mall in Asia New Bay
en.z_inv1_p: Located at No.91, Zhongshan 2nd Road, Qianzhen District, B1F of Chunghwa Trade Building. 813-ping ultra-large U-shaped commercial space: 44m deep, 51m wide, 4.5m high. Independent glass corridor entrance provides optimal separation and freedom for entertainment and leisure industries.
en.z_inv2_p: Adjacent to Nikko Hotel (260 rooms), Jan One Hotel (147 rooms), Kaohsiung InterContinental (253 rooms), and Grand Hi-Lai Hotel (540 rooms). Far Eastern Dept. Store Sanduo shopping district is just a 2-minute walk. Kaohsiung Music Center, 5G AIoT Park, and other major developments converge here.
z_hl: Far Eastern Dept. Store — 10-year Kaohsiung land king, 2-min walk
Nikko · Jan One · InterContinental · Grand Hi-Lai — 4 hotels adjacent
Sanduo commercial district with complete leisure & entertainment
International cruise passenger opportunities at Port Terminal
5G AIoT Kaohsiung Software Technology Park nearby
Underground mall unaffected by weather, open year-round
en.c_inv1_h:
Elevate Your Enterprise
The Premier Core Landmark
en.c_inv1_p: No.236, Datong 1st Road, Qianjin District. 7+1 story standalone Class-A office building. South-facing premium orientation, adjacent to Central Park's 12.7-hectare green space. Single-owner, non-divisible with 7 independent titles. Ideal for corporate HQ, R&D center, medical clinic, or private gallery.
en.c_inv2_p: Yuimom Group brings 28 years of construction excellence and 85 world-class awards. This project features designs by Gary Chang — Hong Kong's first World Top 50 architect — and EDGE International Design. Mitsubishi elevators, YKK AP windows, German Duker cast-iron pipes, and British PERKINS generators — all premium materials.
en.c_fac1_desc: Certified LEED Gold and WELL Gold — achieving the highest standards in energy efficiency, sustainability, and occupant wellness. One of the few internationally dual-certified commercial buildings in Kaohsiung.
en.c_fac2_desc: Equipped with Nippon Steel seismic damping walls, reducing earthquake sway by over 40%, protecting both structural integrity and sensitive interior equipment.
en.c_fac3_desc: Full SS steel-frame construction delivers exceptional seismic resilience. Column-free wide-span design maximizes usable space and layout flexibility on every floor.
en.c_fac4_desc: Mitsubishi 20-person high-speed elevator serving B1 to rooftop. Ultra-quiet operation with advanced safety systems, meeting high-capacity commercial building demands.
en.c_fac5_desc: YKK AP aluminum windows with top-tier CNS airtight and watertight ratings, paired with Low-E double-glazed panels for superior thermal, acoustic, and UV insulation.
c_mat: YKK AP windows, airtight & watertight, typhoon-rated
German Duker cast-iron drainage, silent & fireproof
TCC 4000-psi cement · Tung Ho radiation-free rebar
Full-building water purification · Mainai stainless pipes
600m to MRT Formosa Blvd Station, 5-min walk
en.b_tagline: 162 Ping Corner Flagship · Golden Triangle · Private Elevator
en.b_inv_p: No.308, Baotai Road, Fengshan District — at the convergence of Asia New Bay Area, Kaohsiung International Airport, and Weiwuying Arts Center. Ground-floor corner flagship store at 101.4 ping, with dual frontage of 23.38m on Baotai Road and 18.43m on Sanshang Street. G1 banking-grade zoning, ideal for financial institutions and premium brand flagships.
b_hl: G1 banking zoning, premium brand's first choice
Private elevator, secure independent B1 archives
Asia New Bay × Airport × Weiwuying golden triangle
